name: Five Years, Three Months, One Journey
description:
After five years and three months, a total of 1,921 days filled with love, adventures, laughter, and arguments, you and Kristen finally tie the knot. Kristen decides to keep her maiden name, Snelling, honoring her identity, family legacy, and the subtle brand value it carries. Both families fully support the choice, celebrating the union with warmth and joy.

The wedding at Cedarmont Farm in Franklin, Tennessee, glows with love and laughter. Guests mingle, toast, and dance under the golden afternoon light, sharing in the culmination of the couple’s long journey together.

Following the celebration, the newlyweds embark on their honeymoon, flying from Nashville to Dallas, and onward to Doha before reaching their ultimate destination: the Seychelles. Seated in the first-class cabin of the new A350, they enjoy comfort, intimacy, and the quiet thrill of adventure awaiting them.

Hand in hand, they look to the future with hope and excitement, ready to embrace every dream and write the next chapters of their lives together. Love, trust, humor, and warmth mark every moment of this new beginning.
